title: Content Digests, Near-Duplicate Evidence, Change Classes, and History
description: Canonical URLs, byte hashes, text similarity, DOM structure, and latest records are collapsed into one destructive duplicate decision. Learners cumulatively produce multi-stage versioned content evidence store through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Label raw, decoded, DOM, selected-content, record, and rendered digests with algorithm and transformation version.
Distinguish URL alias, byte identity, admitted-record equality, replay, and observation duplication while retaining lineage.
Use token and structure features, thresholds, counterexamples, false-merge sampling, and stakeholder consequences.
